sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90487" key="protelh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προτελ-ής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, (τέλος᾽</foreign> <sense id="n90487.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">προτέλειος, θυσία</ref> </xr> sacrifice <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">offered before a marriage</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0688.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Agathocl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
